title: VFM - Social Media 20cm Led Ring Light With Phone Holder
features: 8” SELFIE RING LIGHT: A stunning 20cm/8” diameter selfie ring light that’s ideal if you want to brighten up your next video or makeup session. Just attach a tripod or stand and you’re all set to get the shots you want. With USB connectivity.

3 BRIGHTNESS LEVELS: Enjoy 3 lighting modes. There’s white, warm and warm white light. So, when you’re taking selfies, you can choose the different light settings according to create a more or less dramatic effect.

WITH REMOTE CONTROL: Comes with a handy control on the USB cable. Attach the light to a tripod and start your live stream and be in control of any light settings you need. Or if you’re using your phone as a mirror, attach the phone and get a little extra light.

USB CONNECTIVITY: This USB LED ring light doesn’t need batteries. Just power it from any USB supported device and you’re all set. Works with most devices with a USB port including a laptop, PC, power bank or charger. You can use it with a range of devices.

VERSATILE & PORTABLE: Easy to use and easy to transport. Your selfie ring light is brilliant for expert selfies, live filming or just throwing a little light in the situation. The 20cm/8” size makes it easy to carry. Slip it in a bag and you can take it everywhere you go.
description: Product Description The answer to all your social media needs! Every budding influencer needs one of these fantastic small ring lights. Whether you wish to use it for makeup application, selfies, live streams or more, this is a great purchase. A perfect USB powered light for any creators of online content TAKING GREAT SHOTS Set the scene for your live stream or create a dramatic backdrop for your personal pictures. This selfie LED light helps you get the perfect shot. It works with smartphones, your iPad, Laptop or tablet. WIDE ANGLE LENS Your action camera comes with a wide 90 degree angle lens to capture all those unmissable moments. Records video and photo in JPEG format. With 5 million pixel image resolution. PORTABLE Livestreaming a video on your social media channel or need a lighting solution? Grab this brilliantly portable 2m tripod and attach a ring light to give yourself the perfect ambience for whatever you need. 3 LIGHTING MODES White, warm and warm white light. So, when you’re taking selfies, you can choose the right light settings to create a more or less dramatic effect. Plus you can dim for extra ambience. Capture every detail with this super slim and portable HD action cam. Fitted in seconds you’ll be filming everywhere your adventures take you and the 2-inch LCD screen gives crystal clear playback. Record video and photos and it’s waterproof up to 90ft too. Playback is easy and footage is recorded direct to a USB card. Requires a USB card up to 32GB Set includes camera, USB charger cable, helmet mount, bike mount and waterproof casing.
